channel.title: Geometry on Maya Sarangan
channel.description: Recent content in Geometry on Maya Sarangan

item.title: The Geometry of Survival: The Triangle Rescue Mission
item.description: Yesterday, I invited my friend over to my house for a play date. My friend is smart and always has good ideas on what to do. We played for hours and eventually got bored. So, she started looking through my math worksheets on geometry. Then, she asked me “What is the point of knowing all these concepts? Where are you going to use this in the real world?”. Testing time…..!!!

item.title: When Lines Just Touch: The Secret of Tangents
item.description:
I was watching the movie Aladdin when my dad walked in and said “Let’s do something tangential to watching the movie!”. I asked, “what is a tangent?”. After a short session on tangents I ended up with this problem.

Here is the problem:

AB = 9, BC = 12, and triangle ABC is a right-angled triangle. The two circles have the same area. Find the combined area of the 2 circles.
